newsroomStories.title: California College of the Arts gala honoring Carla Emil and Rich Silverstein raises over $1.23 million for student scholarships
newsroomStories.listingTitle: California College of the Arts gala honoring Carla Emil and Rich Silverstein raises over $1.23 million for student scholarships
newsroomStories.summary: CCA celebrated beloved Bay Area art collectors Carla Emil and Rich Silverstein as the 2023 honorees at its annual gala, which took place Tuesday, May 23. The event grossed over $1.23 million for student scholarships.

newsroomStories.title: Three questions with BFA Fashion Design student Ashley Robles-Rasgado
newsroomStories.listingTitle: Three Questions with BFA Fashion Design student Ashley Robles-Rasgado
newsroomStories.summary: Second year BFA Fashion Design student Ashley Robles-Rasgado is striving for a more connected world through accessibility in fashion. Here she shares her thoughts on community, inspiration, and hearing the needs of others.

newsroomStories.title: Fashion students set sail for sustainability
newsroomStories.listingTitle: Fashion students set sail for sustainability
newsroomStories.summary: In partnership with Cotton Incorporated and Materevolve, students explore the intersection of design, science, and ecology through interdisciplinary learning.

image.alt: Three students chat on the boat during the sailing field trip.
